name: google-serp-scraper
description: Web app for Google organic search results via Serper.dev API

scripts.copy-public: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const s='src/public';const d='dist/public';fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s))fs.copyFileSync(p.join(s,f),p.join(d,f));"
